svg.content:
<mxGraphModel adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="o0" value="開発中 (Phase 9)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="30" width="180" height="40" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="o1" value="Manual 発注" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="100" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="o2" value="SecretRequired
(立花 第二暗証番号)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="280" y="100" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="o3" value="取引所送信" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="520" y="100" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="o4" value="OrderEvent (約定)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="520" y="220" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="o5" value="AccountEvent
(口座 / 建玉同期)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="280" y="220" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="oe1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="o1" target="o2" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="oe2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="o2" target="o3" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="oe3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="o3" target="o4" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="oe4" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="o4" target="o5" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>
